title: leptemon ellipticum
intro: Leptemon ellipticum, also known as the Texas sage or Mexican sage, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, calm the nervous system, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Leptemon ellipticum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce anxiety and stress, and improve respiratory issues such as asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to promote relaxation and soothe skin irritations.
